personas.name: Global User Gia
personas.description: An international student who finds mental health terminology difficult to translate.
goals: Understand emotional definitions in native tongue
personas.context: Using the app in a non-English speaking region.

personas.name: Clinical Client Chris
personas.description: A therapy patient who uses logs to guide professional consultations.

personas.name: Budget Tracker Brian
personas.description: A user looking for free mental health resources without recurring costs.
goals: Access core tracking features for free
personas.context: Managing mental health on a fixed income.

personas.name: Pattern Seeker Pam
personas.description: A data-driven user who wants to visualize long-term mental health trends.
pain_points: Limited historical view in free tier

personas.name: Minimalist Mike
personas.description: A user who values simplicity and speed in their daily wellness routine.
personas.context: Quick check-ins during a busy workday.
